intro: Hartogia eckloniana, also known as the Hartogia or African bushwillow, is a small tree or shrub native to the savannas and woodlands of southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health.
